setup.installHint: Install the {{cli}} CLI on your machine. Houston will pick it up automatically.
setup.waiting: Waiting for the sign-in to finish in your browser...

signOutConfirm.title: Sign out of {{provider}}?
signOutConfirm.description: Houston will stop using {{provider}} until you sign in again. Existing missions can still finish their current turn.

toast.engineUnavailable: Houston couldn't reach your workspace. Give it a moment and try again.
toast.connectTimedOut: The connection didn't complete in time. Please try connecting again.
toast.loginTimedOut: The sign-in didn't complete in time. Please try again.
toast.signInPortBusy: Another app on this computer is using the sign-in port. Close other AI coding tools and try again.
toast.catalogLoadFailed: Couldn't load your available AI models. The list may be incomplete until this succeeds.

providerLogin.title: Finish signing in to {{name}}
providerLogin.description: Open the sign-in page in your browser, complete sign-in, then paste the verification code back here.
providerLogin.authCodeDescription: Paste a setup token to finish connecting {{name}}.
providerLogin.codePlaceholder: Paste the code from your browser
providerLogin.deviceDescription: Open the link below, sign in, then enter this one-time code to finish.
providerLogin.deviceCodeHint: Enter this code on the {{name}} page after you sign in.
providerLogin.deviceWaiting: Waiting for you to authorize in your browser...
providerLogin.deviceSettingsHint: Not seeing a code prompt? Turn on device-code sign-in in <link>ChatGPT Settings > Security</link>.
providerLogin.browserDescription: Approve Houston in the browser tab that just opened. This window updates on its own when you finish.

apiKey.title: Connect {{name}}
apiKey.description: Paste your {{name}} API key. Houston keeps it safe and uses it for your chats.
apiKey.label: API key

copilot.title: Connect GitHub Copilot
copilot.domainHint: Ask your IT team if you're not sure.

openaiCompatible.title: Connect a local model
openaiCompatible.description: Point Houston at a model running on your computer, like Ollama, LM Studio or vLLM.
openaiCompatible.baseUrlHelp: The address where your local server is listening. For Ollama this is usually http://localhost:11434/v1.
openaiCompatible.modelHelp: The exact name of the model your server serves.
openaiCompatible.nameHelp: A friendly label for the picker. Defaults to the model name.
openaiCompatible.keyPlaceholder: Leave empty if your server has no key
openaiCompatible.keyHelp: Most local servers don't need one. Add a key only if yours requires it.

claudeLogin.timeout: Claude sign-in timed out. Please try connecting again.
claudeLogin.confirmTimeout: Signed in to Claude, but Houston could not confirm the connection. Please try again.
claudeLogin.autoFailedBody: Paste a Claude setup token to finish connecting.

localModel.title: Connect a local model
localModel.description: Run a model on your own computer and let Houston use it. Houston takes care of the connection.
localModel.detecting: Looking for model apps on your computer...

connecting.title: Connecting your model...
connecting.body: This takes a few seconds. Keep the app open on your computer.

empty.body: To run a model on your own computer, install one of these free apps, then open it:

apps.lmstudio: A friendly app for running models.
apps.ollama: Popular and simple to set up.

hint.lmstudio: Open its Developer tab, then switch the server on.
hint.jan: In Settings, turn on the Local API Server.
hint.ollama: Runs on its own once installed. Nothing to switch on.

empty.reassure: Once it's open, Houston takes care of the rest.

pick.body: Houston found these on your computer. Pick the model you'd like to use.

reasoning.label: Show the model's thinking
reasoning.help: Turn this on for reasoning models (they think before answering).

share.label: Share with my team
share.help: Teammates' agents can use this model. Their requests run through your computer while it's online.

error.body: Something went wrong while connecting. Make sure the app is still open on your computer, then try again.

manual.title: Enter details manually
manual.description: Already have a model server address? Enter it here.

status.offlineHint: Your model isn't reachable right now. Make sure {{app}} is open on this computer.
